highlights: Built a module using Opik's evaluation framework to streamline evaluation processes, migrating existing heuristic and LLM metrics onto the platform for consistent API integration.
Analyzed the RAGAS codebase to adapt LLM, SQL, and NLP metrics for agentic and RAG tasks, optimizing metric portability for Opik integration.
Standardized input formats for agentic metrics (goal accuracy, tool call accuracy, topic adherence) and built a FastAPI endpoint for seamless metric invocation.
